tweets.topic: Airtel Rs 469 and Rs 548 recharge plans: Compare calling, SMS, and data benefits
tweets.tweet: Airtel's ₹469 plan offers 2GB daily data with unlimited calls, while ₹548 bumps it to 3GB daily with added SMS benefits. Pick based on your data habit — the extra gig might save you from painful mid-month throttling. #Airtel #IndianTelecom

tweets.topic: Which is the cheapest way to get a new SIM in India? Plans start at Rs 1
tweets.tweet: Jio launches prepaid plans starting at just ₹1 with basic calling and data benefits for new users in India. Finally, switching networks or getting a backup SIM won't burn a hole in your pocket anymore. #Jio #IndianTelecom

JioBlackRock launches a new Large Cap Fund in India with a focus on established bluechip companies and dividend growth. This could be a solid option for Indians looking to start investing without the rollercoaster ride of smaller stocks. #JioBlackRock #IndianInvesting

tweets.topic: Kolkata Knight Riders vs Rajasthan Royals, IPL 2026 Live Streaming Online and Free Telecast
tweets.tweet: IPL 2026 KKR vs RR match will be live streamed on Jio Cinema and telecast on Star Sports with free options available for fans. Great news if you've been wondering where to catch the action without burning a hole in your pocket. #IPL2026 #CricketIndia

tweets.topic: Airtel 84-Day Prepaid Recharge Plans: Here’s What You Get in April 2026
tweets.tweet: Airtel's 84-day prepaid plans in April 2026 offer unlimited calls, 2GB daily data, and free Netflix access starting around ₹2,499. Pretty solid if you're someone who forgets to recharge every month and wants a streaming bonus bundled in. #Airtel #IndianTelecom

tweets.topic: Airtel expands its 5G services to Gujarat: All details
tweets.tweet: Airtel has expanded its 5G services across Gujarat, bringing faster connectivity to more cities in the state. This means better download speeds and smoother streaming for folks in Gujarat who've been waiting for the 5G upgrade. #Airtel #5GIndia

tweets.topic: Airtel ₹1,599 Broadband Plan: Is It Really Worth the Money? It Offers 300 Mbps—But Does It Deliver Value?
tweets.tweet: Airtel's new ₹1,599 broadband plan delivers 300 Mbps speeds, making it competitive for heavy streamers and gamers in metros. Whether it's worth it really depends on your actual usage—could be perfect or overkill depending on your household. #Airtel #IndianBroadband

tweets.topic: Over 130 million Indians may lose access to hundreds of free TV channels soon, here is why
tweets.tweet: DTH and cable operators are set to shut down free-to-air TV channels, affecting over 130 million Indians as regulatory changes kick in. Looks like those free channels we grew up with might finally become premium, so time to explore streaming apps if you haven't already.

tweets.topic: Designed for Power and Endurance: vivo Launches the vivo T5 Pro with its Biggest-Ever 9020 mAh Battery
tweets.tweet: Vivo T5 Pro just dropped with a massive 9020mAh battery — India's getting a phone that could genuinely last 2+ days on a single charge. If you're tired of hunting for chargers every evening, this is the kind of upgrade that actually matters. #VivoT5Pro #IndianTech
